name: laabu-kiq-personal-copilot
description: A private AI copilot for every employee. Answers general questions using built-in knowledge, drafts and summarises content, and searches documents the user has personally uploaded — with strict per-user file isolation. Uploads new documents to the user's private knowledge base via the Document Intelligence agent.

skills.name: General AI Assistance
skills.description: Answers general questions, drafts emails, writes summaries, explains concepts, and helps with everyday tasks using built-in LLM knowledge — no documents required.
skills.input: Natural language question, draft request, or writing task
skills.output: Direct answer, draft content, or explanation
examples: Draft a follow-up email after yesterday's client call
Summarise these meeting notes in 5 bullet points
Explain what an NDA is in plain English
What are best practices for writing OKRs?

skills.name: Personal Knowledge Search
skills.description: Searches only the documents the user has personally uploaded to their private knowledge base. Other users' documents are never visible.
skills.output: Ranked document excerpts with source file name
examples: Search my documents for the Q3 review notes
What did I upload about the client onboarding process?
Find my notes on the new pricing strategy

skills.name: Upload to Personal Knowledge Base
skills.description: Uploads a document to the user's private knowledge base. Only the uploading user can later retrieve it. Routes through the Document Intelligence agent for analysis and ingestion.

input.document_text: Full text content of the document

examples: Save this meeting summary to my personal knowledge base
Upload my notes from today's workshop
Add this document to my private files

skills.name: List My Uploaded Documents
skills.description: Lists all documents the user has previously uploaded to their personal knowledge base.
skills.output: List of document names and upload dates
examples: Show me all my uploaded documents
What files have I saved to my personal knowledge base?

privacy.note: Each user's documents are stored and retrieved with strict user-ID isolation. No cross-user data access is possible.
